_publications._publicationTitle: Genetically mediated Nf1 loss in mice promotes diverse radiation-induced tumors modeling second malignant neoplasms.

_contextSnippet: radiation-exposure reduced the overall survival of Nf1+/− mice in a dose-dependent manner (log-rank test p<0.0001, Figure 1B) at higher dose levels (15 and 30 Gy). The median survivals of Nf1+/− mice receiving 0, 3, 15, and 30 Gy were 583, 652, 469 and 410 days
details: High dose abdominal irradiation (AI) reduces survival in Nf1+/- mice but not wildtype mice in a dose-dependent manner. Median survivals were 583, 652, 469 and 410 days for 0, 3, 15, and 30 Gy respectively
